_comment: Negative fixture for PRD-103-R7 (no request-local mixing). The `etag` value here is `s256:<22-char-hash>-1714579200` — a producer that appended a Unix timestamp to the hash. Even if the leading 22 chars were derivable, the trailing timestamp is request-local data and changes per build/per request, defeating revalidation. The shape also fails the etag schema: `s256:` must be followed by exactly 22 base64url chars (no extra suffix).

expected_finding.missing: etag value mixes request-local data (timestamp suffix) into the hash; revalidation will fail across rebuilds and replicas
